inputs.label: Compression Ratio (r)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of cylinder volume before compression (BDC) to volume after compression (TDC)

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of cylinder volume before compression (BDC) to volume after compression (TDC)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıkıştırma öncesi silindir hacminin (AÖN) sıkıştırma sonrası hacme (ÜÖN) oranı
businessContext_i18n.de: Verhältnis des Zylindervolumens vor der Kompression (UT) zum Volumen nach der Kompression (OT)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport du volume du cylindre avant compression (PMB) au volume après compression (PMH)
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación de volumen del cilindro antes de la compresión (PMI) respecto al volumen después de la compresión (PMS)
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة حجم الأسطوانة قبل الضغط (BDC) إلى الحجم بعد الضغط (TDC)

inputs.label: Specific Heat Ratio (k)
inputs.businessContext: Adiabatic index (cp/cv) of the working fluid, typically 1.4 for air

businessContext_i18n.en: Adiabatic index (cp/cv) of the working fluid, typically 1.4 for air
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışma akışkanının adyabatik indeksi (cp/cv), hava için tipik olarak 1.4
businessContext_i18n.de: Adiabatenexponent (cp/cv) des Arbeitsmediums, typischerweise 1,4 für Luft
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice adiabatique (cp/cv) du fluide de travail, typiquement 1,4 pour l'air
businessContext_i18n.es: Índice adiabático (cp/cv) del fluido de trabajo, típicamente 1.4 para el aire
businessContext_i18n.ar: معامل ثابت الحرارة (cp/cv) لسائل العمل، عادة 1.4 للهواء

inputs.label: Initial Temperature (T1)
inputs.businessContext: Temperature at the start of compression stroke

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature at the start of compression stroke
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température au début de la course de compression
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura al inicio de la carrera de compresión
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة الحرارة في بداية شوط الضغط

inputs.label: Initial Pressure (P1)
inputs.businessContext: Pressure at the start of compression stroke (intake pressure)

businessContext_i18n.en: Pressure at the start of compression stroke (intake pressure)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression au début de la course de compression (pression d'admission)
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión al inicio de la carrera de compresión (presión de admisión)
businessContext_i18n.ar: الضغط في بداية شوط الضغط (ضغط السحب)

inputs.label: Maximum Temperature (T3)
inputs.businessContext: Temperature after constant volume heat addition (combustion)

businessContext_i18n.tr: Sabit hacimde ısı ilavesi (yanma) sonrası sıcaklık
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur nach der Wärmezufuhr bei konstantem Volumen (Verbrennung)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température après ajout de chaleur à volume constant (combustion)
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura después de la adición de calor a volumen constante (combustión)
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة الحرارة بعد إضافة الحرارة بحجم ثابت (الاحتراق)

inputs.label: Specific Heat (Cv)
inputs.businessContext: Specific heat at constant volume of the working fluid (air ≈ 0.718 kJ/kg·K)

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific heat at constant volume of the working fluid (air ≈ 0.718 kJ/kg·K)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışma akışkanının sabit hacimdeki özgül ısısı (hava ≈ 0,718 kJ/kg·K)
